rows.label: qev085610_MSG0001
rows.name:
It seems the U.M. responses were
being detected from these plants.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0002
rows.name:
Data collection complete. I've
uploaded it to Frontier Net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0003
rows.name: Well then, shall we head to the next spot?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0004
rows.name: Yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0005
rows.name:
Data collection at the second location
complete. Uploaded to Frontier Net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0006
rows.name: Just one left after this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0007
rows.name: Let's get it done real quick![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0008
rows.name:
Upload to Frontier Net
confirmed. It's complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0009
rows.name: That's all of them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0010
rows.name: Good work. I'll contact Doug.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0011
rows.name: Oh, Elma?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0012
rows.name:
We're a little tied up over here,
so excuse me for going audio-only.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0013
rows.name:
Are you in combat!? We'll head
over to assist immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0014
rows.name:
No, no, it's nothing we need help with. My
team is more than enough to handle it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0015
rows.name: But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0016
rows.name: Ah, right...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0016_2
rows.name:
Then, could I ask you guys to handle
the fourth data collection spot?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0017
rows.name: Understood. Please be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0018
rows.name:
Yeah, I'll throw in some chocolate
as a bonus, so forgive me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0019
rows.name: Jeez, you have to treat me to a drink, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0020
rows.name: Eh!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0021
rows.name:
There's a cocoa place I heard rumors about
that's supposed to be expensive and delicious![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0022
rows.name:
Ah, so that's what you
meant. Okay, understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0023
rows.name: Well then, see you after the mission's done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0024
rows.name: Elma-san...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0025
rows.name: Piling on promises is a good thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0026
rows.name:
For someone like him, the more promises he has to
keep, the higher his chances of survival become...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0027
rows.name: That's the feeling I get.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0028
rows.name:
That makes him the exact opposite of Lao-san, doesn't
it? Someone who doesn't keep his promises at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0029
rows.name:
True. Come on, let's hurry
and go collect that data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0030
rows.name: For the sake of our drinks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085610_MSG0031
rows.name: Yes![ST:wait ]
